name: Greek Burgers

ingredients.item: Preheat a grill to medium-high heat (about 350°F on a gas grill; if using a charcoal grill, cooking will take a bit longer).

In a large bowl, combine the chuck, lamb, pork, onion, parsley, salt, pepper, oregano, garlic, and cloves. with clean hands, thoroughly mix the ingredients. Divide the mixture into 6 equal portions, squeezing each to form a ball. Cut the balls in half, insert 1 feta square into each, and re-form the halves into patties. Place the burgers on the grill and cook to your desired doneness: 8 minutes for medium rare to 15 minutes for well-done on a gas grill; 10 to 20 minutes, respectively, on a charcoal grill.
Alternatively, in a skillet over high heat, heat 2 tablespoons olive oil. Add the burgers and cook for 2 to 3 minutes per side, for a nice sear on the outside and a medium-rare inside.
